title: Dathan #1885
definition:
Dathan = "belonging to a fountain"

 1) a Reubenite chief, son of Eliab, who, with his brother, Abiram,
    joined Korah's conspiracy against Moses' authority
nasbUsage:
Definition: Dathan = "belonging to a fountain"

 1) a Reubenite chief, son of Eliab, who, with his brother, Abiram,
    joined Korah's conspiracy against Moses' authority

    NASB:  a Reubenite
